raw_output:
## Band gaps (Materials Project tool results)
(Values are the `band_gap` field returned by the materials lookup JSON.)

| Material | MP material_id | Band gap Eg (eV) |
|---|---:|---:|
| MoS₂ | mp-1042086 | 0.0418 |
| WSe₂ | mp-1023933 | 1.5241 |
| MoSe₂ | mp-7581 | 1.3620 |

## Pairwise band gap offsets and type-II candidacy criterion
Criterion: \(|\Delta E_g| = |E_{g,1} - E_{g,2}| > 0.3\ \text{eV}\) ⇒ **TYPE2_CANDIDATE** (necessary, not sufficient, for type-II alignment).

| Pair | \(|\Delta E_g|\) (eV) | Classification |
|---|---:|---|
| MoS₂ / WSe₂ | 1.4823 | **TYPE2_CANDIDATE** |
| MoS₂ / MoSe₂ | 1.3202 | **TYPE2_CANDIDATE** |
| WSe₂ / MoSe₂ | 0.1621 | **NOT** type-II candidate by this criterion |

## Which pairs exceed 0.3 eV offset?
- **MoS₂/WSe₂** (1.4823 eV) — YES  
- **MoS₂/MoSe₂** (1.3202 eV) — YES  
- **WSe₂/MoSe₂** (0.1621 eV) — NO  

## Ranking for charge-separation potential (by \(|\Delta E_g|\) only)
1. **MoS₂/WSe₂** (largest offset)
2. **MoS₂/MoSe₂**
3. **WSe₂/MoSe₂** (fails the >0.3 eV offset screen)

## Literature context (PubMed tool)
At least one real PMID supporting type-II / charge-transfer in TMD heterostructures:
- **PMID: 34520661** — *Ultrafast Charge-Transfer Dynamics in Twisted MoS₂/WSe₂ Heterostructures* (discusses typical type-II alignment and interfacial charge transfer).
(Also returned by the tool: **PMID: 39602879** on **MoSe₂/WSe₂** type-II vdW heterostructure engineering.)
